name: Ankur Prakash
quote: As someone who has been working as a software developer for almost 7 long years, I was eager to enhance my skills and strengthen my fundamentals. Scaler was recommended to me by a friend who was already riding the wave.

name: Priya Nair
quote: Mock interviews were brutal at first — I was humbled. By the fourth one, hard problems started feeling familiar. Amazon called two months after I finished the program.

name: Rahul Sharma
quote: 3 years at a service company and I was stuck. Scaler's system design curriculum was the unlock — Flipkart called in month 8. I went from 8 LPA to 28 LPA.

name: Sneha Iyer
quote: I had zero product-company exposure. Scaler's placement team got me a direct hiring-manager intro at Razorpay — no cold applications, no middlemen.

name: Deepak Verma
quote: The structured curriculum and peer learning made all the difference. I never thought I'd make it to a top startup, but here I am — 3× my previous CTC.

name: Kavya Reddy
quote: Coming from a service company, I didn't think FAANG was possible. Scaler's mentors showed me it was about preparation, not pedigree.

name: Arjun Menon
quote: I was pigeonholed in ops. Scaler helped me bridge the gap to DevOps engineering with real projects and system design depth.

name: Neha Gupta
quote: Career switcher here — marketing to frontend in 10 months. The structured path and mentor support made the impossible feel systematic.
